[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101100 4
1 0010001 2
2 0010111 4
3 0100101 3
4 0110111 5
5 1101000 3
6 1010011 4
7 1100000 2

01 10 1100000 2 match 7
12 21 0000000 a
23 32 0010001 2 match 1
34 43 0000101 2
45 54 0100101 3 match 3
56 65 0100000 1
67 76 1000000 1
70 07 1000000 1

02 20 0000000 a
13 31 0000100 1
24 42 0000001 1
35 53 0010111 4 match 2
46 64 0100000 1
57 75 0010011 3
60 06 1100000 2 match 7
71 17 1000000 1

14 41 0100100 2

36 63 0000000 a
47 74 0000001 1
50 05 0100000 1
61 16 1101000 3 match 5
72 27 0010001 2 match 1

15 51 0100100 2
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0010011 3
